subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Hearken unto the call of this Bird at the time when He hath detached Himself from all who are in the heavens and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبدالله اسمع ندآء هذا الطیر حین الذی انقطعت عن کل من فی السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
